mapper.insert: insert into creative_interaction_comment(target_type, target_id, user_id, user_name, avatar, content, parent_id, score, status, gmt_create) values(#{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{avatar}, #{content}, #{parentId}, #{score}, '0', sysdate())
insert ignore into creative_interaction_like(target_type, target_id, user_id, gmt_create) values(#{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{userId}, sysdate())
mapper.delete: delete from creative_interaction_like where target_type = #{targetType} and target_id = #{targetId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select count(1) from creative_interaction_like where target_type = #{targetType} and target_id = #{targetId} and user_id = #{userId}
select count(1) from creative_interaction_like where target_type = #{targetType} and target_id = #{targetId}
mapper.insert: insert ignore into creative_interaction_follow(creator_id, user_id, gmt_create) values(#{creatorId}, #{userId}, sysdate())
mapper.delete: delete from creative_interaction_follow where creator_id = #{creatorId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: select count(1) from creative_interaction_follow where creator_id = #{creatorId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into creative_interaction_share(target_type, target_id, user_id, platform, gmt_create) values(#{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{userId}, #{platform}, sysdate())
